intro.slide1Desc: AI scans your child's device for harmful content — fully on-device, completely private.
intro.slide2Desc: Real-time location sharing so you always know your child is safe, wherever they are.
intro.slide3Desc: One app to protect your child online and in the real world. Simple, powerful, trusted.

wizard.readySubtitle: Adora is all set and watching over your child.

permission.locationDescription: Share your child's location so you always know they're safe and where they need to be.
permission.notificationDescription: Get instant alerts when your child arrives, leaves, or needs your attention.
